stages.concept:
# Unit 160: 의문문의 화법전환 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **의문문의 화법전환**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **의문사가 있는 의문문**: said → asked + 의문사 + 주어 + 동사 (평서문 어순)

> 직접: He **said**, "**Where** do you live?"
> 간접: He **asked** me **where** I **lived**.
> 그는 나에게 어디 사는지 물었다.

> 직접: She **said**, "**What** are you doing?"
> 간접: She **asked** me **what** I **was doing**.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **의문사가 없는 의문문 (Yes/No)**: said → asked + **if/whether** + 주어 + 동사

> 직접: He **said**, "**Do** you like pizza?"
> 간접: He **asked** me **if** I **liked** pizza.
> 그는 나에게 피자를 좋아하는지 물었다.

> 직접: She **said**, "**Can** you swim?"
> 간접: She **asked** me **if** I **could** swim.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 공통 규칙: 의문문 → **평서문 어순**, 물음표(?) → **마침표(.)**

**Q. 다음 직접화법을 간접화법으로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르세요.**
직접화법: She said, "Where is the post office?"
1. She asked me where was the post office.
2. She asked me where the post office was. ✅
3. She asked me if the post office was.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정답이에요. 전달동사를 asked로 바꾸고, '의문사(where) + 주어 + 동사'의 간접의문문 형태인 평서문 어순으로 만들어준 뒤에 마침표를 찍어주는 것이 맞습니다! 주절이 과거이므로 be동사 시제도 is에서 was로 일치시켜 주었죠.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 의문사 있으면 의문사 + 평서문 어순, 없으면 if/whether + 평서문 어순! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 160: 의문문의 화법전환 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 직접화법을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
He said to me, "Are you happy?"
→ He asked me (     ) I was happy.
> **정답** if (whether)

---

**02.** She said to him, "Where do you live?"
→ She asked him (     ) he lived.
> **정답** where

---

**03.** He said to me, "Do you like coffee?"
→ He asked me (     ) I liked coffee.
> **정답** if (whether)

---

**04.** She said, "What time is it?"
→ She asked (     ) it was.
> **정답** what time

---

**05.** He said to me, "Can you help me?"
→ He asked me (     ) I could help him.
> **정답** if (whether)

---

**06.** 직접화법을 간접화법으로 바꾸시오.
He said to me, "Are you a student?"
> **정답** He asked me if (whether) I was a student.

---

**07.** She said to him, "Where did you go?"
> **정답** She asked him where he had gone.

---

**08.** He said to me, "Do you have a pen?"
> **정답** He asked me if (whether) I had a pen.

---

**09.** She said, "What is your name?"
> **정답** She asked what my name was.

---

**10.** He said to me, "Will you come tomorrow?"
> **정답** He asked me if (whether) I would come the next day.

---

**11.** 간접화법을 직접화법으로 바꾸시오.
He asked me if I was hungry.
> **정답** He said to me, "Are you hungry?"

---

**12.** She asked him where he lived.
> **정답** She said to him, "Where do you live?"

---

**13.** He asked me if I could swim.
> **정답** He said to me, "Can you swim?"

---

**14.** She asked what time it was.
> **정답** She said, "What time is it?"

---

**15.** He asked me if I had finished my homework.
> **정답** He said to me, "Have you finished your homework?"

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그는 나에게 행복하냐고 물었다. (간접화법)
He me asked if I was happy
> **정답** He / asked / me / if / I / was / happy

---

**17.** 그녀는 그에게 어디에 사는지 물었다. (간접화법)
She him asked where he lived
> **정답** She / asked / him / where / he / lived

---

**18.** 그는 나에게 펜이 있는지 물었다. (간접화법)
He me asked if I had a pen
> **정답** He / asked / me / if / I / had / a / pen

---

**19.** 그녀는 몇 시인지 물었다. (간접화법)
She asked time what it was
> **정답** She / asked / what / time / it / was

---

**20.** 그는 나에게 내일 올 수 있는지 물었다. (간접화법)
He me asked if I would come the next day
> **정답** He / asked / me / if / I / would / come / the / next / day
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 160: 의문문의 화법전환 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
She said to me, "Do you have a smart watch?"
→ She ____________ me if I had a smart watch.
asked to
said to
asked
said
> **정답** asked

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
She said to me, "Have you ever been to America?"
→ She asked me if ________________ ever been to
America.
that you had
I had
I have
that I had
> **정답** I had

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
She said to me, "When is your birthday?"
→ She asked me when
___________________________.
was my birthday
my birthday is
my birthday was
is my birthday
> **정답** my birthday was

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
She asked me if I knew his address.
→ She said to me, "______________________ his
address?"
Did you know
Do you know
I know
I knew
> **정답** Do you know

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이
바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She said to me, "How is your family these days?"
→ She _________ me ________________________
those days.
said - how was my family
said - if your family was
asked - how my family was
asked - if my family was
> **정답** asked - how my family was

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이
바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
He said to me, "Have you seen the movie before?"
→ He ________ me _________________________ the
movie before.
asked - if I had seen
said - if I have seen
asked - that I had seen
said - that I have seen
> **정답** asked - if I had seen

---

**07.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이
바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The teacher said to us, "Who will answer this
question?"
→ The teacher _________ us
________________________ question.
asked - who would answer that
said - who would answer this
asked - who will answer that
said - would who answer this
> **정답** asked - who would answer that

---

**08.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이
바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She said to me, "Was the library crowded?"
→ She _________ me ________ the library _______
crowded.
asked - whether - had been
asked - if - was
said to - that - had been
said to - if - had been
> **정답** asked - whether - had been

---

**09.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린
곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오. (틀리지 않은 곳은
그대로 둠)
My mom says to me, "What do you want to eat for
dinner?"
→ My mom asks me if you want to eat for dinner.
asks - if - I - want
tells - if - I - want
asks - what - I - want
tells - what - I - want
> **정답** asks - what - I - want

---

**10.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린
곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오. (틀리지 않은 곳은
그대로 둠)
She said to me, "Where do you want to visit in
Korea?"
→ She told me if I want to visit in Korea.
told - where - I - want
asked - if - I - wanted
asked - where - I - wanted
told - where - I - wanted
> **정답** asked - where - I - wanted

---

**11.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린
곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오. (틀리지 않은 곳은
그대로 둠)
She said to him, "Why were you upset with your
friend?"
→ She told him if he had been upset with his friend.
asked - why - he - were - his
asked - if - he - were - his
asked - if - he - had been - his
asked - why - he - had been - his
> **정답** asked - why - he - had been - his

---

**12.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린
곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오. (틀리지 않은 곳은
그대로 둠)
She said to him, "Were you watching the movie with
your brother?"
→ She asked him that he were watching the movie
with his brother.
asked - that - had been
asked - that - were
asked - if - were
asked - if - had been
> **정답** asked - if - had been

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀가 나에게 말했다. "작년 크리스마스에 뭐 했니?"
She told me, "What had you done on
Christmas last year?"
She told me, "What did you do on Christmas
last year?"
She said to me, "What do you do on Christmas
last year?"
She said to me, "What did you do on
Christmas last year?"
> **정답** She said to me, "What did you do on Christmas last year?"

---

**14.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
엄마가 내게 언제 수업이 끝날지 물어보셨다.
Mom asked me when I will finish class.
Mom asked me when would I finish class.
Mom told me when I would finish class.
Mom asked me when I would finish class.
> **정답** Mom asked me when I would finish class.

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그가 내게 왜 영어를 공부하냐고 물었다.
He told me why I study English.
He told me why I studied English.
He asked me whether I studied English.
He asked me why I studied English.
> **정답** He asked me why I studied English.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀가 내게 중국 음식을 좋아하냐고 물었다.
She asked me that I like Chinese food.
She asked me if I liked Chinese food.
She told me if I like Chinese food.
She told me that I liked Chinese food.
> **정답** She asked me if I liked Chinese food.

---

**17.** 다음 중 화법 전환이 잘못된 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
He said to her, "Did you visit my house last
Saturday?"
→ He asked her whether she visited his house
the previous Saturday.
He said to me, "Did you hand in your report on
time?"
→ He asked me if I had handed in my report
on time.
He said to her, "Have you ever thought about
becoming a programmer?"
→ He asked her if she had ever thought about
becoming a programmer.
He said to them, "Are you having any fun?"
→ He asked them if they had been having any
fun.
> **정답** He said to her, "Did you visit my house last Saturday?" → He asked her whether she visited his house the previous Saturday., He said to them, "Are you having any fun?" → He asked them if they had been having any fun.

---

**18.** 다음 중 화법 전환이 잘못된 것을 고르시오.
She said to me, "Why did you argue with them
yesterday?"
→ She asked me why I argued with them the
previous day.
She said to us, "Where are we going to have
lunch today?"
→ She asked us where we were going to have
lunch that day.
He said to me, "Why did you cancel your trip?"
→ He asked me why I had cancelled my trip.
She said to him, "How long have you worked
here?"
→ She asked him how long he had worked
here.
> **정답** She said to me, "Why did you argue with them yesterday?" → She asked me why I argued with them the previous day.

---

**19.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 틀린 곳을 고쳐 쓰시오.
She said to him, "Do you know her phone
number?"
→ She asked him that he know her
phone number.
> **정답** asked, if (whether), knew

---

**20.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 틀린 곳을 고쳐 쓰시오.
He said to her, "Where do I have to put these
books?"
He asked her where I have to
put those books.
> **정답** asked, where, he, had
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 160 의문문의 화법전환중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
He said to me, "Do you speak English well?"
→ He  (     ) .
정답 asked me if I spoke English well

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
She said to me, "Can I see you tomorrow?"
→ She asked me
.
정답 if she could see me the following day

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
My teacher said to me, "Why were you late for
class?"
→ My teacher asked me
.
정답 why I had been late for class

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
She asked if I liked pop music.
→ She said, "  (     ) ?"
정답 Do you like pop music

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
He asked me what I wanted to do. .
→ He said to me, "
?"
정답 What do you want to do

---

**06.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여
문장을 완성하시오. (간접화법)
엄마가 내게 누가 TV를 깨뜨렸냐고 물으셨다.
힌트 (     ) break
Mom  (     )  me  (     )   (     )   (     )  the TV.
정답 asked, who, had, broken

---

**07.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여
문장을 완성하시오. (간접화법)
그는 나에게 그가 테이블을 어디로 옮길 수 있는지 물었다.
힌트 (     ) can move
He asked me  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  the
table.
정답 where, he, could, move

---

**08.** 다음 화법전환에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
She said to me, "Do you want to read this book
now?"
→ She asked me if you want to read this book
now.
She asked me  (     ) .
정답 if I wanted to read that book then

---

**09.** 다음 화법전환에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
She said to him, "Where were you an hour ago?"
→ She asked him if he were an hour before.
She asked him  (     ) .
정답 where he had been an hour before

---

**10.** 다음 화법전환에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
(축약형을 사용하지 말것)
She asked me what I had seen the day before.
→ She said to me, "What you saw the day before?"
She said to me, "  (     ) ?"
정답 What did you see yesterday

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 160: 의문문의 화법전환 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He said to me, "Do you have a pet?" → He ____________ me if I had a pet. asked to said to asked said
> 정답: asked

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He said to me, "Have you ever been to Japan?
" → He asked me if ________________ ever been to Japan. that you had I had I have that I had
> 정답: I had

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He said to me, "When is your graduation?
" → He asked me when ___________________________. was my graduation my graduation is my graduation was is my graduation
> 정답: my graduation was

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He asked me if I knew her phone number.
→ He said to me, "______________________ her phone number?" Did you know Do you know I know I knew
> 정답: Do you know

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
He said to me, "How is your project going these days?
" → He _________ me ________________________ those days.
said - how was my project going said - if your project was going asked - how my project was going asked - if my project was going
> 정답: asked - how my project was going

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She said to me, "Have you finished the assignment already?
" → She ________ me _________________________ the assignment already.
asked - if I had finished said - if I have finished asked - that I had finished said - that I have finished
> 정답: asked - if I had finished

---

**07.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The coach said to us, "Who will lead the warm-up today?
" → The coach _________ us ________________________ warm-up that day.
asked - who would lead the said - who would lead the asked - who will lead the said - would who lead the
> 정답: asked - who would lead the

---

**08.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
He said to me, "Was the cafeteria busy?
" → He _________ me ________ the cafeteria _______ busy.
asked - whether - had been asked - if - was said to - that - had been said to - if - had been
> 정답: asked - whether - had been

---

**09.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린 곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
My dad says to me, "What do you want to eat for lunch?
